title: Asenovgrad, Plovdiv — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Asenovgrad, Plovdiv: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Asenovgrad is a city in Plovdiv with a population of 50,590. A historic town near Plovdiv, known for the Asen’s Fortress, the Bachkovo Monastery, and its role as a center of Bulgarian Orthodox Christianity.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
